features: CLEAN AND SOFT SKIN: NIVEA Crème Soft body cream shower gel offers a touchably soft and healthy skin feel after every shower. The gentle formula is suitable for everyday use
SKIN PROTECTION FORMULA: This NIVEA body moisturiser shower cream is formulated with jojoba oil, glycerin and panthenol; it pampers and protects skin from drying out
NIVEA SCENT: Containing elements of the original NIVEA crème and NIVEA fragrance, the shower cream skin moisturiser indulges your senses while you shower
HOW TO APPLY: Simply squeeze a small amount of this shower skin moisturiser onto hands and lather, then massage into wet skin for deeply nourished skin
PLANET AND SKIN CONSCIOUS: NIVEA delivers high-quality products to suit various skin types. Bottles are made from 97% recycled plastic and is fully recyclable
description: Product Description NIVEA Crème Soft - For a soft and moisturised skin feeling Let the soft lather of this NIVEA Crème Soft shower cream nourish your skin with every shower. Infused with vitamin C, E, and precious oils, this indulgent shower gel not only pampers your skin but also shields it from drying out. NIVEA's everyday body wash, formulated with jojoba oil, glycerin and panthenol, leaves your skin feeling velvety soft and clean. At NIVEA, we are dedicated to reducing our carbon footprint by using bottles made from 97% recycled plastic that are fully recyclable. Discover the ultimate blend of nature's goodness for your skin with NIVEA Crème Soft. Application information: Simply massage onto wet skin and rinse off for a refreshing cleanse. Product benefits: Luxurious shower cream for touchably smooth, soft skin feel Formulated with vitamins C, E & precious oils to protect skin from drying out Carefully chosen ingredients like jojoba oil, glycerin and panthenol Perfect for daily use pH skin neutral Microplastic-free & 96% recycled plastic Ingredients Aqua,Sodium Laureth Sulfate,Cocamidopropyl Betaine,PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate,Parfum,Glycerin,Glyceryl Glucoside,Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil,Sodium Chloride,PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil,Polyquaternium-7,Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer,Citric Acid,PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate,Sodium Benzoate,Linalool,Limonene,Citronellol,Benzyl Alcohol,Geraniol,,Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone Safety Warning Avoid contact with eye area.
